title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Runwal Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
